chunks.text: NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday March 30, 2024 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday March 30, 2024 We are scheduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to update our NetAp

duling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to update our NetApp fileserver, from 8am to 12pm on Saturday, March 30, 2024 . All Home directories and Project shares (CIFS/SMB and NFS) may experience disconnection during the update that may cause data loss on activ

uring the update that may cause data loss on active, open files. Please close your open files and save them before Saturday Morning. Services (e.g. webservice) that depend on this storage will also be temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenan

e temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenance is completed, NFS clients should automatically resume normal operation, but a reboot should help if they don’t. CIFS clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply b

acOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply be rebooted. UPDATE [2024-03-30 | larsrohr ] This work was completed by 10:15am. If you are encountering any issues with file access, please try rebooting your machine first. Then contact help@eecs if

ing your machine first. Then contact help@eecs if the issue persists. Resolved as of 2024-03-30 10:15am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services a
d. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
